This is a District based table with the following filters applied: State(s) (All Years): All 50 + DC; Name (All Years): South Portland Public Schools

Data Source: U.S. Department of Education National Center for Education Statistics Common Core of Data (CCD) "Local Education Agency (School District) Universe Survey" 2013-14 v.1a  2016-17 v.2a  2017-18 v.1a  2018-19 v.1a  2019-20 v.1a  2020-21 v.1a  2021-22 v.1a  2022-23 v.1a  2023-24 v.1a  2024-25 v.1a; "Local Education Agency (School District) Universe Survey Membership Data" 2014-15 v.1a  2015-16 v.1a.
† indicates that the data are not applicable.
– indicates that the data are missing.
‡ indicates that the data do not meet NCES data quality standards.
